title: memory_bram breaks memory initialization for non-0 start_offset

features.name: unpacked memory with non-zero lower bound address
features.description: Code should include an unpacked memory declaration where the address range lower bound is non-zero

features.name: initial block memory writes at non-zero addresses
features.description: Code should include an initial block that writes to specific addresses of a memory with non-zero start offset

features.name: synchronous write memory with async read for BRAM inference
features.description: Code should include a memory with synchronous write and asynchronous read suitable for Xilinx BRAM inference via synth_xilinx
